behaviors.reasoning: Exponential backoff calculation is a pure function: input attempt count, output wait time. No dependencies.
Identifying a rate-limit response and computing wait time is pure logic on the response object — no wiring needed.
Actually resending the request requires the retry logic wired to the HTTP client — testing the chain from rate-limit detection through resend to caller response.
Error type selection after max retries is a pure conditional — if attempts >= max then return QuotaExhaustedError.
Verifying the full retry→exhaust→error chain terminates requires the client wired to a mock API through the complete lifecycle.
Shared quota under concurrency requires multiple callers wired to the same quota tracker — testing shared state across async boundaries.
FIFO dispatch ordering is a pure queue property — testable on the dispatch queue data structure alone.
